architecture.summary: Two targeted fixes in ado-spec-sync.ts. Bug 1: add featureId param to findStoryByTitle and scope WIQL with System.Parent. Bug 2: fetch relations before re-parenting in updateStory, remove old parent if different.

integrations.summary: ADO REST API only. Uses existing GET workitems expand=relations endpoint for parent detection, existing PATCH for relation removal. No new integrations.

ui-ux.summary: No UI changes. Backend sync logic only — CLI output unchanged.

performance.summary: Adding System.Parent clause to WIQL narrows results — net positive. Extra GET for relations in updateStory adds one API call per story update, acceptable.

security.summary: No new auth, no new credentials, no user input changes. featureId is an integer from ADO API, safe for WIQL interpolation.

edge-cases.summary: Edge cases: story with no parent (add directly), story with correct parent (no-op), story with wrong parent (remove+add), feature with zero stories (skip), multiple WIQL matches scoped to same feature (take first).
